name: Whitsunday Getaway 3D/3N
description: Cruise the Whitsundays on board Whitsunday Getaway for an unforgettable escape into tropical paradise! Enjoy the splendour of an extended trip, lasting 3 days and 3 nights - longer than most tours in the Whitsundays. The perfect escape for couples and honeymooners who want to see the Whitsundays in style, designed to offer couples the chance to be wined and dined whilst exploring the breathtaking scenery.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
highlights:
Cruise the Whitsundays aboard a luxurious vessel
Extended 3-day, 3-night tour
Perfect for couples and honeymooners
Explore tropical paradise in style
Experience wine and dine luxury
price_tiers: Private Queen Ensuite Cabin (sleeps 2): FROM A$1420
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Couples and honeymooners seeking a luxurious and romantic escape
important_information: ['Each passenger must have a clear understanding of safety directions and instructions given in English by the crew and be able to complete the required safety forms in English.', 'A passenger is only able to participate in water activities if they have a level of swimming experience.', 'If a passenger is unable to swim they will still be able to participate in the sailing trip, but will not be able to participate in water activities such as snorkelling.', 'In order to meet our minimum safety standards, passengers must be able to exit the vessel unassisted in the unlikely case of an emergency.', 'The minimum age for travelling on Whitsunday Getaway is 18 years old.']
what_to_bring: ['Change of clothes', 'Swimwear', 'Toiletries', 'Insect repellent', 'Water bottle to refill', 'Camera', 'Comfortable walking shoes', 'Sun protection (sunscreen, hat, sunnies etc.)', 'Warm clothes/pullover for evenings (seasonal)', 'Your own set of fins if you have them']
whats_extra: ['BYO alcohol and soft drinks - no glass bottles permitted (with the exception of wine bottles)', 'A $15 per day surcharge may apply for some dietary requests and requirements.', 'Additional snorkel equipment (fins, prescription masks etc.)', 'Peak holiday seasons (i.e. Christmas, Easter, New Years) may incur a surcharge.', 'Luggage storage']
cancellation_policy: No shows or client cancellations made within 30 days of departure forfeit 100% of the total ticket price. Cancellations made between 30-60 days of departure incur a 25% cancellation fee. A refund in the event of cancellation is subject to both our Cancellation Policy and the terms of the supplier.
